definition: to leave someone or something permanently
example: The crew abandoned the sinking ship.

definition: the quality or state of being able to do something
example: She has the ability to learn quickly.

definition: the state of not being present
example: His absence from work was noticed.
There is absolute silence in the room.

definition: to take in or soak up
existing in thought or as an idea
to agree to take or receive
the right to use or enter
example: Access to the building is restricted.
She accompanied him to the meeting.

definition: to take and use as one's own

example: She works at a travel agency.

definition: to set aside for a purpose
example: Funds were allocated for the project.
We need to alter our plans.
A large amount of money was spent.
We need to analyze the results.
The annual conference is next week.

definition: a way of dealing with something

example: We need to assess the situation.
I associate this smell with home.
Attach the file to the email.
They attempted to climb the mountain.
This is the basis for our plan.
This is a breach of contract.
She is capable of handling this.

definition: the ability to learn and understand
movement from one place to another
to reduce as much as possible
to take up space or time
to partly cover the same area
a way from one place to another
